candidate_check.description: Outlook must be configured to prevent users overriding attachment security settings.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Prevent users from customizing attachment security settings is set to "Enabled".

Use the Windows Registry to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\outlook

If the value for disallowattachmentcustomization is set to REG_DWORD = 1, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Prevent users from customizing attachment security settings to "Enabled".
title: Outlook must be configured to prevent users overriding attachment security settings.
